allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const a=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Assignments:', a.length\); a.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.date, x.indicador_externo, x.indicador_interno, x.volante1, x.volante2, x.audio\)\);")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":3000" | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "\\s+"\)[-1] }\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Rafael Diniz\\Documents\\quadro"; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "OK")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK -', len\(d\), 'assignments, June 1:', d[0]['indicador_externo'] if d else 'none'\)")
